messages.content: What is an Emanator in Honkai: Star Rail lore?
An Emanator is someone who has an Aeon's permission to draw power from that Aeon's Path.
What is required for someone to become an Emanator?
They must possess power granted through an Aeon's blessing.
How does the text contrast Nanook and IX in how Emanators arise?
Nanook deliberately selects Lord Ravagers, while IX unintentionally produces Nihility Emanators through its shadow and apathy.
How are Emanators generally perceived by others relative to Aeons?
Even if not fully subservient, they are regarded as emissaries of the Aeons' wills.
According to the Data Bank description, why does Emanator power vary?
Because each Aeon has different attitudes toward Emanators and shares different degrees of Path power.
What behavior is attributed to Aha regarding Emanator creation?
Aha is said to randomly grant Path power to mortals and toy with them according to mood.
What happened when Aha made a Noblesse Worm an Emanator?
Aha gave it vast intelligence and the full Path's power, then discarded it; without the blessing, the worm died instantly.
What capability is explicitly shared by Emanators of Enigmata and Remembrance?
Both are described as capable of creating dreamscapes from memoria.
How does the text define Lord Ravagers in relation to Nanook and Destruction?
They are beings selected and branded by Nanook to execute Destruction's will by returning things to entropy and waging interstellar war.
Name the Lord Ravagers listed under Destruction.
Archforger, Asat Pramad, Celenova, Luxbane, Phantylia, Zephyro, Irontomb, and Zulo.
What does selection by Nous imply for Erudition Emanators?
Those selected by Nous become members of the Genius Society.
Are Genius Society members portrayed as a unified faction?
No; some aid cosmic progress, while others work independently for personal research interests.
How are Harmonic Strings characterized under the Path of Harmony?
They are multiple embodiments or facets of Xipe, not followers of one individual, and can take Family members' forms as needed.
Who can serve as tuners of Harmonic Strings?
Family members above scale degree IV, called Chordmasters.
Why do many people think Nihility Emanators should not exist, and what does the text say instead?
Because IX never glances at anyone; however, Nihility Emanators do exist without intentional creation by IX.
How can a Self-Annihilator become associated with Emanator status under Nihility?
A rare few resist Nihility's encroachment alone, stretching self-annihilation toward infinity and presumably becoming Emanators.
Who is explicitly named under Self-Annihilators in the Nihility section?
Acheron is explicitly named, alongside unnamed Self-Annihilators.
What does the Preservation section say about confirmed Emanator count in current Astral Express data?
It says only two Preservation Emanators are confirmed in current data bank intel.
Which named Preservation Emanators are listed, and what special note is attached to Diamond?
Diamond and Taravan Keane are listed; Diamond's power is split among the Ten Stonehearts' Cornerstones.
What combat-scale traits are attributed to a Propagation Emanator?
Its inherited mandibles and death ray could shatter celestial bodies, and its giant scythes harvested planets for nesting.
Which specific Propagation Emanator is named?
Skaracabaz of The Swarm.
How are the Pure Children of Anasrava described in relation to Fuli?
They are special Remembrance Emanators born from Fuli's shattered corpus, each a candidate to become Fuli at the end of time upon Aeonhood.
Which named figures are listed under Pure Children of Anasrava?
Cyrene and March 7th, with forms noted as Demiurge and Evernight respectively.
What is required to become an Arbiter-General under The Hunt?
One must undergo three ceremonies apparently presided over by Lan to assume the mantle.
What role do Xianzhou Arbiter-Generals play according to the Hunt section?
They command each Xianzhou ship as the Reignbow's sharp arrows and wield formidable spirits bestowed by Lan.
Name the Hunt-aligned leaders or generals explicitly listed.
Marshal Hua, Feixiao, Huaiyan, Jing Yuan, Teng Xiao, Xuanquan, Yao Guang, Youwu, and Yueyu.
Which groups are listed under the Path of Abundance?
Denizens of Abundance and Elixir Seekers.
Which Abundance Emanators are explicitly named?
Shuhu, Wingperor, and Evanescia.
Which Elixir Seeker is listed as an Emanator?
Evanescia.
Which two Denizens of Abundance are named?
Shuhu and Wingperor.
From whom does Nanook select Lord Ravagers?
From those with destructive impulses from worlds Nanook has destroyed.
What does Nanook's branding of Lord Ravagers grant?
A mark that grants them powers of Destruction.
What doctrine do Lord Ravagers implement as executors of Destruction?
Returning all things to entropy.
Why do academics think Lord Ravagers were elevated as Nanook's emissaries?
Because of their obsessive and intense destructive aesthetic.
How is Aha's temperament described in the Elation section?
Utterly unpredictable, whim-driven, and lacking self-consciousness.
What did Aha do to the Noblesse Worm after it outlived its purpose?
Aha discarded it.
Who are the those clowns likely referring to in the Elation section?
Likely the Masked Fools.
Which named Elation Emanator entry includes a level tag?
Silver Wolf LV.999.
Are any Enigmata Emanators named individually in the list?
No, only unnamed Emanators are listed.
What do HooH and HooH's Emanators try to achieve?
An ideal universal balance through subtle influence.
Who admired HooH's ideas according to the Equilibrium text?
The Arbitrators.
Why were the Arbitrators repeatedly patching past fallacies?
Because mortal rules are flawed and could not maintain perfect zero-sum balance over time.
How does HooH respond to mortal efforts and drama in Equilibrium?
HooH watches in silence, viewing mortal drama as unable to shake restoration of order.
Which Equilibrium organization is listed under confirmed Emanators?
The Arbitrators, with unnamed members.
What sub-entry appears under Zandar One Kuwabara?
Lygus.
Besides Zandar One Kuwabara, which named Genius Society members are listed?
Dr. Primitive and Herta.
Does the confirmed list include unnamed Emanators in multiple paths?
Yes, several paths include unnamed entries.
Under Harmony, what condition earns Xipe's favorable regard?
Carrying out down-to-earth virtues that enable harmony.
Do Harmonic Strings follow one specific person?
No, they are facets of Xipe rather than followers of a specific individual.
Name the four Harmonic Strings listed.
Aelenev, Beatriz, Constantina, and Dominicus.
How is Sunday listed under Harmony?
Sunday is listed as temporary.
What belief about Nihility Emanators comes from IX's apathy?
That they should be impossible because IX never glances at anyone.
How are Self-Annihilators described as arising under Nihility?
People under IX's shadow can be tainted by Nihility and become Self-Annihilators.
Does IX intentionally create Nihility Emanators?
No, IX does not intentionally create them.
Why do many assume Preservation Emanators exist in the IPC?
Because the IPC is the cosmos's largest financial body and a disciple of Qlipoth.
Why is information on other Preservation Emanators unavailable?
It is locked behind layers of encryption with no other available sources.
What unnamed Preservation entry is listed under the IPC?
Unnamed members of the Interastral Peace Corporation.
Why is a Propagation Emanator called primitive and pure?
Likely because it belongs to The Swarm.
From whom were the Propagation Emanator's mandibles inherited?
Directly from Tayzzyronth.
What did the Propagation Emanator use shattered stars for?
As incubators for producing offspring.
How are Pure Children of Anasrava diverse in origin?
They come from different birthplaces, races, identities, and life experiences.
What single trait do all Pure Children of Anasrava share?
They have all walked the Path of Remembrance.
What future role is each Pure Child of Anasrava a candidate for?
Becoming Fuli when ascending to Aeonhood at the end of time.
What medium do Remembrance Emanators use to create dreamscapes?
Memoria.
Who takes up arms alongside Xianzhou ship generals in The Hunt text?
The marshal of the Alliance.
What metaphorical title is given to Hunt commanders serving Lan?
The sharp arrows of the Reignbow.
Who bestows the formidable spirits of the Seven Arbiter-Generals?
Lan.
Which listed Hunt figures are marked as former title holders?
Teng Xiao as former Lightning-Lord and Yueyu as former Flying Aureus.
Who is listed as the current Lightning-Lord?
Jing Yuan.
Which title is attached to Feixiao?
Flying Aureus.
Which title is attached to Yao Guang?
Kalacakra Skyplume.
Which faction heading contains the Hunt Emanator listings?
The Xianzhou Alliance.
What is the inclusion rule for the confirmed Emanators by Path section?
A character must be explicitly stated to be an Emanator.
What source types can confirm an Emanator for inclusion?
In-game statements or other official sources.
Are Emanators described as fully subservient to Aeons?
No, they are not completely subservient.
What metaphor describes Aeons driving their Paths in the Data Bank text?
A towering tsunami engulfing mountains.
What metaphor describes favored mortals drawing Path power with permission?
Huge waves that erode the coast.
In what setting does the Data Bank place these events?
In an empty stellar vastness.
Can an Aeon choose not to create Emanators at all?
Yes, some Aeons have no intention of creating Emanators and ignore worldly squabbles.
How do some Aeons treat Emanators as extensions of themselves?
They generously open their Path completely to those Emanators.
What does Aha do to mortals according to mood?
Aha toys with humans according to mood.
Name one path where only unnamed Emanator entries appear in the list.
Enigmata.
Under which path is Silver Wolf listed as an Emanator entry?
Elation.
Under which path is Diamond listed?
Preservation.
Under which path is Acheron listed?
Nihility.
Under which path is Skaracabaz listed?
Propagation.
Under which path is Dr. Primitive listed?
Erudition.
Under which path is Sunday listed as temporary?
Harmony.
Which Abundance subgroup contains Shuhu?
Denizens of Abundance.
Which Abundance subgroup contains Evanescia?
Elixir Seekers.
Which organization contains Lord Ravagers in the Destruction section?
The Antimatter Legion.
Which Aeon selects members into the Genius Society?
Nous.
Which Aeon is represented by facets called Harmonic Strings?
Xipe the Great One.
Which Aeon is associated with the Arbitrators in Equilibrium?
HooH.
Which Aeon is tied to the Pure Children of Anasrava?
Fuli.
Which Aeon is tied to the Self-Annihilators' shadow effect?
IX.
Which Aeon brands Lord Ravagers with a mark?
Nanook.
Which progenitor is named as the source of a Propagation Emanator's mandibles?
Tayzzyronth.
Which path section lists both Cyrene and March 7th?
Remembrance.
Which path section mentions Silver Wolf LV.999 and a Noblesse Worm together?
Elation.
